title: The Black Banner
description: The Black Banner is a medieval fantasy modpack of war, conquest, and high-seas adventure. Build fortresses, command armadas, and forge your legacy in a world shaped by battle. Will your banner rise—or fall?
body: Welcome to '**The Black Banner**'! We created our new medieval-themed modpack for our own discord server. Since our **discord server** is _medieval-themed_ as well. 'The Black Banner' modpack implements (taming) _tiny_ dragons, unique structures and a more 'dangerous' experience to the overworld. Thanks to the already existing weapons, armor and different UI everyone gets to experience their Minecraft in a new way! This modpack is for everyone loving medieval and for those who would love to explore, build and conquer the overworld together!
